overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Mafia III showing a character walking through a 1960s New Orleans-inspired city at night. The character travels from a commercial strip through residential neighborhoods toward an industrial waterfront district, with vintage cars and period-appropriate architecture visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with shops and parked cars

events.description: companion character in green jacket enters white car and exits the scene

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past storefronts and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: companion in green jacket walking alongside ego before entering a white car

entered.detail: row of brick buildings with awnings and large windows housing shops
vintage red convertible parked at the curb with top down
metal merchandise rack standing on the sidewalk
black metal trash can on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial sidewalk at night, passing a red convertible and various storefronts. A companion in a green jacket walks alongside before entering a white parked car around the 10-second mark. Street lamps illuminate the brick buildings lining the street.

events.description: steps off sidewalk and enters the crosswalk to cross the street
vintage cars with headlights on pass through the intersection while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white vintage car driving through the intersection with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights
two-story green wooden house with porch on the corner

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a city street at a marked crosswalk, moving from the commercial strip into a residential area. Vintage cars pass through the intersection with headlights glaring. A green house becomes visible on the opposite corner as the character navigates across the asphalt.

events.description: turns right at the corner and continues along the residential sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past historic homes and parked vintage cars

entered.detail: traditional two-story wooden houses with porches and decorative trim
vintage yellow sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a quiet residential neighborhood with historic wooden houses and mature trees lining the street. Vintage cars are parked along the curb. The industrial district becomes visible in the distance with a large building featuring red neon signage.

events.description: crosses road marked with large white STOP letters, entering industrial district
street lighting becomes more sparse as character approaches industrial waterfront

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the industrial sidewalk toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large industrial complex with smokestacks and prominent red neon signage
metal railing along the waterfront edge
long low industrial warehouse structures with metal roofs

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a road with large STOP markings painted on the asphalt, transitioning from residential to industrial surroundings. A massive industrial complex with red neon signage and smokestacks dominates the background. The character walks along a sidewalk next to a waterfront railing, passing warehouse buildings.

events.description: passes a stop sign and continues along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial waterfront sidewalk passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in suit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: octagonal stop sign on a pole at the sidewalk edge
tall building with illuminated windows visible in the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the industrial waterfront sidewalk, passing a stop sign and other pedestrians. The waterfront railing runs along the left side with the industrial complex and city skyline visible across the water. The area is dimly lit by sparse street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal city that transitions from a bustling commercial strip into a quiet residential neighborhood and finally into a dimly lit industrial waterfront. It begins on a brick-lined sidewalk past storefronts and a red convertible, where a companion in a green jacket departs in a parked white car. As the character crosses a city street through the glare of vintage headlights, the scene shifts from the commercial district toward a residential area marked by a green house on the corner. The camera then glides through a quiet neighborhood of historic wooden houses and mature trees before crossing a road with large painted stop markings that open up to a massive industrial complex with red neon signage and smokestacks. Finally, the movement continues along a waterfront railing past warehouse buildings and sparse street lamps, with the city skyline and industrial structures looming across the water.
